purpose: 测评不同 垂类型下、不同场景下的效果。以及不同 Prompt 的复杂度的效果。 你需要考虑不同垂直领域下的用词丰富度。每个query 字数超过 300
queries: 请生成一张高端医疗美容诊所的室内环境图，场景设定为一间现代化的皮肤管理治疗室，整体空间采用极简主义的白色与原木色搭配，营造出专业、洁净且温馨的氛围。画面中央是一张符合人体工学的电动美容床，床头配备专业的LED光谱治疗仪和射频美容仪器，墙面安装有大尺寸的电子皮肤检测仪显示屏，实时展示皮肤分析数据。房间一侧设有落地式的护肤品展示柜，陈列着各类高端医美品牌的产品，包括玻尿酸精华、胶原蛋白面膜、抗衰安瓶等。天花板上安装有无影手术灯和智能调光系统，可根据治疗需求调节色温与亮度。背景中可以看到一扇带有磨砂玻璃的推拉门，隐约透出走廊的柔和灯光。整体画面要求光线柔和自然，采用医疗级洁净光源，阴影过渡细腻，材质表现真实，包括皮革床面的质感、金属仪器的冷冽光泽、以及木质元素的温润触感。构图采用对称式布局，强调空间的专业性与秩序感，同时通过绿植点缀增添生机，体现现代医美空间"科技与自然融合"的设计理念。画面风格偏向商业摄影，色彩饱和度适中，适合用于医美机构的官方宣传册或高端杂志广告。

scoring_dimensions.label: 意图还原度
scoring_dimensions.description: prompt 是否抓住了用户原意

final_prompt.prompt: 请生成一张高端医疗美容诊所的室内环境图，场景设定为一间现代化的皮肤管理治疗室，整体空间采用极简主义的白色与原木色搭配，营造出专业、洁净且温馨的氛围。画面中央是一张符合人体工学的电动美容床，床头配备专业的LED光谱治疗仪和射频美容仪器，墙面安装有大尺寸的电子皮肤检测仪显示屏，实时展示皮肤分析数据。房间一侧设有落地式的护肤品展示柜，陈列着各类高端医美品牌的产品，包括玻尿酸精华、胶原蛋白面膜、抗衰安瓶等。天花板上安装有无影手术灯和智能调光系统，可根据治疗需求调节色温与亮度。背景中可以看到一扇带有磨砂玻璃的推拉门，隐约透出走廊的柔和灯光。整体画面要求光线柔和自然，采用医疗级洁净光源，阴影过渡细腻，材质表现真实，包括皮革床面的质感、金属仪器的冷冽光泽、以及木质元素的温润触感。构图采用对称式布局，强调空间的专业性与秩序感，同时通过绿植点缀增添生机，体现现代医美空间"科技与自然融合"的设计理念。画面风格偏向商业摄影，色彩饱和度适中，适合用于医美机构的官方宣传册或高端杂志广告。

final_prompt.prompt:
Create a commercial interior photograph of a high-end medical aesthetic clinic's skin treatment room.

Style/medium: Commercial architectural photography, clean editorial style with subtle depth and realistic material rendering
Composition: Symmetrical wide-angle shot centered on the treatment bed, eye-level perspective, balanced spatial order
Subject: Ergonomic electric aesthetic bed with leather upholstery, LED phototherapy device, RF beauty equipment, large digital skin analysis display on wall
Scene/backdrop: Minimalist treatment room with white and natural wood palette, floor-to-ceiling skincare display cabinet with premium products, frosted glass sliding door revealing soft corridor light
Lighting/mood: Soft natural medical-grade clean light with intelligent dimming system, gentle shadow transitions, professional and serene atmosphere
Color palette: White as dominant base, warm natural wood as secondary, subtle green from plants as accent, moderate saturation
Materials/textures: Genuine leather bed surface with visible grain, cool metallic sheen on instruments, warm tactile wood grain, frosted glass diffusion
Avoid: harsh shadows, oversaturated colors, cluttered composition, generic stock photo aesthetic, 8K stuffer terms

final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: product-mockup
Asset type: commercial interior photography for medical aesthetic clinic brochure
Primary request: symmetrical wide shot of a modern minimalist skin treatment room in a high-end medical aesthetic clinic
Scene/backdrop: spacious treatment room with frosted glass sliding door revealing soft hallway light, professional medical environment
Subject: ergonomic electric treatment bed at center, LED phototherapy device and RF beauty equipment at headboard, large electronic skin analyzer display on wall, floor-to-ceiling skincare display cabinet with premium medical-grade products (hyaluronic acid serums, collagen masks, anti-aging ampoules), shadowless surgical light and smart dimming system on ceiling
Style/medium: commercial interior photography, photorealistic architectural visualization
Composition/framing: symmetrical layout emphasizing professional order, wide establishing shot, centered perspective
Lighting/mood: soft natural medical-grade clean lighting with smooth shadow transitions, adjustable color temperature and brightness
Color palette: minimalist white + natural wood tones + subtle green accents from plants, moderate saturation
Materials/textures: genuine leather bed surface texture, cool metallic sheen on instruments, warm tactile wood elements, frosted glass translucency
Constraints: maintain symmetrical composition, emphasize "technology meets nature" design philosophy, professional and clean atmosphere
Avoid: cluttered composition, harsh shadows, oversaturated colors, plastic-looking materials, watermark, text overlay
